title: There is / There are + Prepositions
description: Learn to describe places and rooms using 'there is / there are' and prepositions of place.
descriptionTr: Mekanları ve odaları 'there is / there are' ve yer edatlarıyla tanımlamayı öğren.

vocabulary.example: The kitchen is very clean and modern.
vocabulary.extra: There is a big kitchen in the house.

vocabulary.example: The bathroom is next to the bedroom.
vocabulary.extra: There are two bathrooms in this apartment.

vocabulary.example: There are three bedrooms in the house.
vocabulary.extra: My bedroom is on the second floor.

vocabulary.example: The living room is spacious and bright.
vocabulary.extra: We watch TV in the living room every evening.
vocabulary.extraTr: Her akşam oturma odasında TV izleriz.

vocabulary.example: There is a small balcony with a nice view.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Güzel manzaralı küçük bir balkon var.
vocabulary.extra: I drink my coffee on the balcony every morning.

vocabulary.example: Is there free parking near the house?
vocabulary.exampleTr: Evin yakınında ücretsiz otopark var mı?
vocabulary.extra: The parking is behind the building.

vocabulary.example: There is a beautiful garden in front of the house.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Evin önünde güzel bir bahçe var.
vocabulary.extra: The kids play in the garden after school.

vocabulary.example: The furniture in the apartment is new.
vocabulary.extra: There is modern furniture in every room.

vocabulary.example: There are clean towels in the bathroom.
vocabulary.extra: Can you put extra towels in the bedroom, please?
vocabulary.extraTr: Yatak odasına ekstra havlu koyar mısınız, lütfen?

vocabulary.example: There is an extra blanket in the closet.
vocabulary.extra: It's cold at night. I need another blanket.
vocabulary.extraTr: Geceleri soğuk oluyor. Bir battaniye daha lazım.

vocabulary.example: There are two pillows on each bed.
vocabulary.extra: The pillows are very soft and comfortable.

vocabulary.example: There is a hot shower in the bathroom.
vocabulary.extra: I take a shower every morning before work.
vocabulary.extraTr: Her sabah işten önce duş alırım.

vocabulary.example: There is a fridge in the kitchen.
vocabulary.extra: You can keep your food in the fridge.

vocabulary.example: There is a microwave on the kitchen counter.
vocabulary.extra: You can heat your food in the microwave.

vocabulary.example: There is an oven next to the fridge.
vocabulary.extra: I bake bread in the oven on weekends.

vocabulary.example: Is there a washing machine in the apartment?
vocabulary.extra: The washing machine is in the bathroom.

vocabulary.example: There is a big couch in the living room.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Oturma odasında büyük bir kanepe var.
vocabulary.extra: The couch is very comfortable for watching movies.
vocabulary.extraTr: Kanepe film izlemek için çok rahat.

vocabulary.example: There is a dining table in the kitchen.
vocabulary.extra: The keys are on the table near the door.

vocabulary.example: There are four chairs around the table.
vocabulary.extra: Please sit on the chair next to the window.

vocabulary.example: The stairs are between the kitchen and the living room.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Merdivenler mutfak ile oturma odası arasında.
vocabulary.extra: Be careful on the stairs, they are steep.

vocabulary.example: The apartment is on the third floor.
vocabulary.extra: There is a carpet on the floor in the bedroom.
vocabulary.extraTr: Yatak odasının zemininde bir halı var.

vocabulary.example: There is a terrace on the roof.
vocabulary.extra: You can see the sea from the roof.

vocabulary.example: The neighbors are very friendly and quiet.
vocabulary.extra: Our neighbor lives on the second floor.

vocabulary.example: The neighborhood is very quiet at night.
vocabulary.extra: I want a quiet room, please.

vocabulary.example: The street is noisy during the day.
vocabulary.extra: Is the apartment noisy at night?

vocabulary.example: The living room is very spacious.
vocabulary.extra: We need a spacious apartment for our family.
vocabulary.extraTr: Ailemiz için geniş bir daire lazım.

vocabulary.example: The bedroom is small but very cozy.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Yatak odası küçük ama çok rahat.
vocabulary.extra: This is a cozy place. I feel at home here.
vocabulary.extraTr: Burası sıcak bir yer. Kendimi evimde gibi hissediyorum.

vocabulary.example: There is a beautiful sea view from the balcony.
vocabulary.exampleTr: Balkondan güzel bir deniz manzarası var.
vocabulary.extra: The view from the roof is amazing at sunset.

vocabulary.example: Is there air conditioning in the bedroom?
vocabulary.extra: The air conditioning works very well in summer.

vocabulary.example: There is a heater in every room.
vocabulary.extra: Turn on the heater, please. It's cold.

grammar.title: There is / There are + Prepositions of Place
grammar.titleTr: There is / There are + Yer Edatları
grammar.explanation: We use 'there is' for singular (one thing) and 'there are' for plural (more than one). We use prepositions of place (in, on, under, next to, between, behind, in front of, above, near) to say WHERE something is.
grammar.explanationTr: 'There is' tekil (bir şey) için, 'there are' çoğul (birden fazla) için kullanılır. Yer edatları (in, on, under, next to, between, behind, in front of, above, near) bir şeyin NEREDE olduğunu söylemek için kullanılır.
table: There is a fridge in the kitchen.
There are two bathrooms in the house.
in / on / under / next to / between / behind / in front of / above / near
The microwave is on the counter. The cat is under the table.

tips.tr: Kısaltma: There is → There's (konuşmada çok kullanılır)

tips.en: in = inside something: in the kitchen, in the box
tips.tr: in = bir şeyin içinde: mutfakta, kutuda

tips.en: on = touching the surface: on the table, on the wall
next to = beside: The couch is next to the window.
tips.tr: next to = yanında: Kanepe pencerenin yanında.

tips.en: between = in the middle of two things: between the fridge and the oven
tips.tr: between = iki şeyin arasında: buzdolabı ve fırın arasında

tips.en: There is + uncountable nouns too: There is water in the fridge.
tips.tr: Sayılamayan isimlerle de 'there is' kullanılır: Buzdolabında su var.

reading.text:
Welcome to our cozy apartment in Antalya! This is the perfect place for your holiday.

There are two bedrooms in the apartment. The main bedroom is spacious with a big bed and a beautiful sea view from the window. There is air conditioning in both bedrooms. The second bedroom is smaller but very cozy. There are extra blankets and pillows in the closet.

The kitchen is modern and fully equipped. There is a fridge, a microwave, and an oven. There are plates, glasses, and everything you need for cooking. The living room is next to the kitchen. There is a comfortable couch and a big TV.

There is one bathroom with a hot shower and clean towels. The washing machine is also in the bathroom.

There is a small balcony with two chairs and a table. The view is amazing — you can see the sea! The neighborhood is very quiet and safe. There is free parking in front of the building.

⭐ Guest review by Marco: "Great apartment! Everything is clean and the location is perfect. The kitchen is well-equipped and the bed is very comfortable. The only problem — there isn't a heater, so it was a little cold in December. But the host is very friendly and helpful. I definitely recommend this place!"
reading.textTr:
Antalya'daki rahat dairemize hoş geldiniz! Burası tatiliniz için mükemmel bir yer.

Dairede iki yatak odası var. Ana yatak odası geniş, büyük bir yatağı ve pencereden güzel bir deniz manzarası var. Her iki yatak odasında da klima var. İkinci yatak odası daha küçük ama çok rahat. Dolapta ekstra battaniye ve yastık var.

Mutfak modern ve tam donanımlı. Buzdolabı, mikrodalga ve fırın var. Tabak, bardak ve yemek yapmak için ihtiyacınız olan her şey var. Oturma odası mutfağın yanında. Rahat bir kanepe ve büyük bir TV var.

Sıcak suyu olan bir duş ve temiz havluları olan bir banyo var. Çamaşır makinesi de banyoda.

İki sandalye ve bir masalı küçük bir balkon var. Manzara harika — denizi görebilirsiniz! Mahalle çok sessiz ve güvenli. Binanın önünde ücretsiz otopark var.

⭐ Misafir yorumu — Marco: "Harika daire! Her şey temiz ve konum mükemmel. Mutfak iyi donanımlı ve yatak çok rahat. Tek sorun — ısıtıcı yok, bu yüzden Aralık'ta biraz soğuktu. Ama ev sahibi çok samimi ve yardımsever. Bu yeri kesinlikle tavsiye ediyorum!"

questions.question: How many bedrooms are there in the apartment?
What can you see from the balcony?

dialog.title: Calling the Airbnb Host
dialog.context: Eyüp, Antalya'da bir Airbnb kiralamak istiyor. Ev sahibi Sarah'ı arayıp ev hakkında sorular soruyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hello! This is Sarah. How can I help you?
lines.textTr: Merhaba! Ben Sarah. Size nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hi Sarah! I'm Eyüp. I'm interested in your apartment in Antalya. Can I ask some questions?
lines.textTr: Merhaba Sarah! Ben Eyüp. Antalya'daki dairenizle ilgileniyorum. Birkaç soru sorabilir miyim?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: There are two bedrooms. The main bedroom has a sea view and the second one is smaller but cozy.
lines.textTr: İki yatak odası var. Ana yatak odasının deniz manzarası var ve ikincisi daha küçük ama rahat.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Great! Is there air conditioning? It's very hot in summer.
lines.textTr: Harika! Klima var mı? Yazın çok sıcak oluyor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, there is air conditioning in both bedrooms and in the living room.
lines.textTr: Evet, her iki yatak odasında ve oturma odasında klima var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Perfect. Is there a washing machine? I'm staying for two weeks.
lines.textTr: Mükemmel. Çamaşır makinesi var mı? İki hafta kalacağım.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, there is a washing machine in the bathroom. And there are clean towels and extra blankets in the closet.
lines.textTr: Evet, banyoda bir çamaşır makinesi var. Ve dolapta temiz havlular ve ekstra battaniyeler var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: What about the kitchen? Is there a microwave and an oven?
lines.textTr: Mutfak ne durumda? Mikrodalga ve fırın var mı?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes! The kitchen is fully equipped. There is a fridge, a microwave, an oven, and everything for cooking.
lines.textTr: Evet! Mutfak tam donanımlı. Buzdolabı, mikrodalga, fırın ve yemek yapmak için her şey var.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Is there parking near the building? I'm coming by car.
lines.textTr: Binanın yakınında otopark var mı? Arabayla geliyorum.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, there is free parking in front of the building. No problem!
lines.textTr: Evet, binanın önünde ücretsiz otopark var. Sorun değil!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: One more question — is the neighborhood quiet or noisy?
lines.textTr: Bir soru daha — mahalle sessiz mi yoksa gürültülü mü?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: It's very quiet and safe. The neighbors are friendly too. You'll love it!
lines.textTr: Çok sessiz ve güvenli. Komşular da samimi. Bayılacaksınız!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: That sounds wonderful! I want to book it. Thank you so much, Sarah!
lines.textTr: Kulağa harika geliyor! Rezervasyon yapmak istiyorum. Çok teşekkür ederim, Sarah!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: You're welcome, Eyüp! I'll send you the details. See you soon!
lines.textTr: Rica ederim, Eyüp! Detayları göndereceğim. Yakında görüşürüz!

questions.question: Where is the air conditioning?
options: In both bedrooms and the living room

questions.question: How is Eyüp coming to Antalya?

fillBlanks.sentence: There ___ a big kitchen in the apartment.
There ___ three bedrooms in the house.
There ___ a balcony with a sea view.
___ there any towels in the bathroom?
There ___ any parking near the building.
The oven is ___ the fridge and the counter.
There ___ extra blankets in the closet.

multipleChoice.question: "Mutfakta bir buzdolabı var." İngilizce'de hangisi?
options: There are a fridge in the kitchen.
There is a fridge in the kitchen.
It is a fridge in the kitchen.
A fridge is there in the kitchen.

multipleChoice.question: "There ___ any chairs in the room." (sandalye yok)
"The picture is ___ the couch." (kanepenin üzerinde, duvarda)

sentenceOrder.correct: There is a fridge in the kitchen
Are there two bathrooms in the house
There isn't a garden in the apartment
The couch is next to the window
Is there air conditioning in the bedroom
There are clean towels in the bathroom
The parking is in front of the building
There aren't any chairs on the balcony
The microwave is on the kitchen counter

translation.english: There is a fridge in the kitchen.
acceptAlso: There's a fridge in the kitchen.

translation.english: How many bedrooms are there in the house?
There are clean towels in the bathroom.
acceptAlso: There're clean towels in the bathroom.

translation.english: The couch is next to the window.
acceptAlso: The sofa is next to the window.

translation.english: There is parking in front of the building.
acceptAlso: There's parking in front of the building.

translation.english: There is air conditioning in every room.
acceptAlso: There's air conditioning in every room.
